summary: Completed frontend testing of AGM Sales Salary Calculator. Fixed critical localStorage persistence bug. All new features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Dashboard page loads correctly with stats cards
Employee Master CRUD operations work correctly
'Only Sunday Pay, No OT' toggle appears in Add Employee modal
'Only Sunday Pay, No OT' toggle appears in Edit Employee modal
'No OT' badge displays for employees with onlySundayNoOT setting
Short Hours Tolerance (mins) field is present and configurable (default: 15)
'Use OT from Sheet' toggle correctly removed from Configuration
Updated OT rules showing 'Net OT = OT Hours - Short Hours'
Salary Report page shows correct columns: OT Hrs, Short Hrs, Net OT, OT Days, Payable
Employee detail modal shows calculation formula breakdown
localStorage persistence works correctly after fix
Navigation between all pages works correctly

bugs_fixed.issue: localStorage persistence race condition - data was being cleared on page navigation
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed state initialization to use lazy initialization from localStorage, added isInitialLoadComplete ref to prevent overwriting stored data on mount

context_for_next_testing_agent: localStorage persistence bug was fixed. All new features (Only Sunday No OT toggle, Short Hours Tolerance, updated salary formula) are working correctly. The app is client-side only with no backend.

features_verified.employee_master_crud: Working - Add, Edit, Delete all functional
features_verified.only_sunday_no_ot_toggle: Working - Present in both Add and Edit modals, badge displays correctly
features_verified.configuration_page: Working - All sections present, Short Hours Tolerance field configurable
features_verified.salary_report_columns: Verified in code - Net OT, OT Days, Total Payable Days columns present
features_verified.employee_detail_modal: Verified in code - Calculation formula breakdown present
features_verified.localstorage_persistence: Fixed and working - Data persists across page navigations
